# Diablo4Storage.ReadAttributeFormulas method

Read + decode the GameBalance [`AttributeFormulaTable`](../AttributeFormulaTable.md) (default SNO `201912`, the paragon formula table). Returns formula text + name/GBID indices only — evaluation and the calibrated intrinsics stay with the consumer.
